name: SubDCreationOptions.ConcaveCornerOption
summary: Defines how concave corners are treated.

enum_values.name: None
enum_values.summary: No concave corners. In general, this is the best choice.

enum_values.name: AtMeshCorner
enum_values.summary: A concave subd corner will appear at input mesh boundary vertices where the corner angle >= MinimumConcaveCornerAngleRadians() and the number of edges the end at the vertex is >= MinimumConcaveCornerEdgeCount().
